evidence.label: Reviewability
evidence.text: Merged 309 PRs in the window, impact rank #11 of 125 active engineers, #2 by raw PR volume. Typical PR: 211 lines across 5 files.

evidence.label: Post-merge health
evidence.text: Post-merge health: 8 of 309 PRs (2.6%) were fixed by a DIFFERENT engineer's referencing PR within 30 days; 2 reverted. e.g. #60488 → #60947 (High confidence).

evidence.label: Tests
evidence.text: Tests with fixes: 76/107 bug/regression PRs (71%) shipped a test file; 43% of all PRs link a tracked issue.

evidence.label: Review influence
evidence.text: Review influence: reviewed 118 other engineers' PRs (1 with changes requested); review-graph centrality 85th percentile.
